examples: Dogs and owners socialize at 'Yappy Hour! ' at Bella & Daisy's upscale dog bakery and boutique on Union Street.
Small dogs generally live longer than big dogs-so that yappy Yorkshire terrier next door could be around for a long time.
He had long since given up being able to care for his pet dog "Pepper", a small, rat-looking, yappy dog who was 16 (112 in dog years) herself.
And we could go to Yappy Hour, out there in the courtyard, running round in circles, sniffing behinds with the rest of the mutts.
